user_prompt: Ticket: 'Need help understanding my invoice for May.' Route this to the right team and assign priority.
actual_output:
Priority: **MEDIUM**  
Category: **Billing - Invoice Inquiry**  
Route to: **Billing Team**

Suggested internal note: Customer needs clarification on their May invoice. Billing team should review invoice line items, charges, credits/discounts, taxes, and any plan changes during the billing period.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to categorize the ticket by priority and route it to the appropriate team as requested.
